Headline: No trains between 54th/Cermak and Central Park
ShortDescription: Pink Line service has been temporarily suspended between 54th/Cermak and Central Park due to an obstruction on the tracks near Cicero.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Pink Line service has been temporarily suspended between 54th/Cermak and Central Park due to an obstruction on the tracks near Cicero.

As a result, trains are operating only between Central Park and Washington/Wells at this time.

Shuttle buses are available from 54th/Cermak to Central Park to provide connecting service through the affected area. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#21 Cermak

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
